description: A wide horizontal painting showing two human figures flying horizontally through a deep teal-blue space. Each figure extends one arm forward, grasping or reaching toward a luminous white sphere or orb of light. The upper figure is male with short hair, the lower is female with flowing hair. Their bodies are rendered in muted flesh tones against the dark blue background. Small points of light and abstract shapes are scattered in the lower portion. The style blends socialist realism with visionary or cosmic imagery.
